chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1451 of 2020 Fresh case 1. For order on Misc.No. 6621/20 2. For order on office objection no.1 3. For order on Misc.No.662/20 4. For order on Misc.No.663/20 5. For order on Misc.No.664/20 6. For hearing of main case ----- 02.03.2020 Mr. Irfan Aziz, advocate for the petitioner. ------ Heard arguments. Perusal of the petition reveals that there is dispute between the petitioner and the private respondent over sale and purchase of the house and settlement of accounts over the income of Masjid and Madarsa. Such disputes involving factual controversy could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its writ jurisdiction under the garb of protection. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with the listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE
